codeReview.summary: Current implementation completes the remaining wrong-window ownership hardening by injecting the caller WebviewWindow into get_mouse_and_window_position, and the existing bootstrap shell gating logic still keeps pending/error fallback usable while blocking ready non-user windows from shell/control mounting.

summary: Pass. The reviewed commit fixes the remaining caller-window ownership hotspot for mouse capture, and the current bootstrap/App/index gating code still satisfies the feature contract for pending/error fallback usability and non-user shell/control blocking. No blocking or non-blocking issues found in the current implementation.
